data.title: Irish High Court approves Mallinckrodt plc's merger with Endo, Inc., expected to close in early August.
data.description: The merger between Mallinckrodt plc and Endo, Inc. (OTCQX: NDOI) is anticipated to be finalized in early August 2025. This significant step in the process was confirmed as the Irish High Court recently issued the required ruling for the merger to proceed. The companies are moving forward with their plan to combine forces through a stock-based transaction. This development marks a crucial milestone in the merger process, with both parties working towards a successful integration. Details regarding the merger's financial implications and its potential impact on the healthcare industry are expected to become clearer as the closing date approaches.
EUROPEAN COMMISSION REFERS HUNGARY TO THE COURT OF JUSTICE OF THE EUROPEAN UNION FOR CONTRADICTING THE UNION'S POSITION ON INTRA-EU ARBITRATIONS UNDER THE ENERGY CHARTER TREATY
EU PROPOSES JOINT BORROWING TO FINANCE €400 BILLION CRISIS TOOL

data.title: IRIS Software Group names Jason Dies as new CEO, effective July 14, 2025, succeeding Gus Malezis.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, IRIS Software Group, a prominent worldwide supplier of accountancy, education, HR, and payroll software, disclosed the selection of Jason Dies as its latest Chief Executive Officer, commencing duties on July 14, 2025. Dies takes over from Gus Malezis, the former CEO.

data.title: Jacobs to design Seattle light rail extension, enhancing community connections with Sound Transit's West Seattle Link Extension.
data.description: Jacobs, a leading company listed on the NYSE under the symbol J, has recently been chosen to offer design services for the West Seattle Link Extension by Sound Transit in Dallas. This initiative, aiming to enhance Seattle's light rail system, promises an expanded transit network that will not only ensure reliable mobility but also strengthen community connections. The project, scheduled to be completed by July 17, 2025, signifies a significant step towards boosting transportation infrastructure in the area and is set to cater to the growing needs of the population.
US Natural Gas Supply to Freeport LNG's Texas Export Facility Is Nearly Restoring, Indicating the Plant Is Coming Back to Full Operation
German Bundesbank President Warns That If Tariffs Happen in August, Germany Might Face a Recession in 2025

data.title: 36% of Gen Z use crypto daily, while Gen X leads in high-value spending. Crypto favored for gaming, daily purchases, and travel.
data.description: A surge in preference for cryptocurrency among Gen Z users is evident in categories like gaming, daily purchases, and travel bookings. These users are increasingly opting to use digital currencies in these areas, showcasing a shift away from traditional payment methods. This trend highlights a notable increase in the number of Gen Z individuals utilizing cryptocurrencies, underscoring a growing acceptance and adoption of this new form of currency.
UKRAINE RECEVIED 850,000 LARGE-CALIBRE AMMUNITION PIECES INCLUDING 320,000 155MM SHELLS UNDER CZECH INITIATIVE THIS YEAR AS OF MID JULY , CZECH DEFENCE MINISTRY SAYS

data.title: Q-Gold appoints Peter Tagliamonte as CEO; Dr. Andreas Rompel becomes COO & VP Exploration. Updates effective July 17, 2025.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, Q-Gold Resources Ltd. revealed the appointment of Peter Tagliamonte, P.Eng. as its new Chief Executive Officer. This announcement marks Dr. Andreas Rompel transitioning to the position of Chief Operating Officer and VP Exploration at the company. Q-Gold Resources Ltd. is traded on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol QGR and on the OTC market as QGLDF. Dr. Rompel will continue serving on the board of directors.

data.title: Ollie's opens 600th store in Belmont, NH, expanding into 34th state. Largest retailer in America. - 97 characters
data.description: Belmont, NH is about to welcome some great deals as Ollie's Bargain Outlet Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:OLLI) recently marked the opening of its 600th store in the town. This expansion into Belmont also signifies the company's venture into New Hampshire, making it their 34th state presence. Ollie's, known as America's biggest retailer of discounted excess inventory and closeout merchandise, is now making its mark in the area, bringing its renowned bargain shopping experience to the residents of Belmont and beyond.

data.title: Limited Spec Automotive in Miami offers research on the customized Lamborghini Urus S Mansory, combining power and aesthetics.
data.description: In Miami, Limited Spec Automotive has introduced a specialized range featuring the Lamborghini Urus S Mansory, an exclusive SUV blending Lamborghini's powerhouse with Mansory's distinct design and performance upgrades. This offering includes extensive research and a curated selection of the custom-made models. The city of Miami serves as the backdrop for this launch, taking place on July 17, 2025. This luxury SUV option aims to showcase the fusion of Lamborghini's raw power with Mansory's signature aesthetic and enhancements, catering to the elite automotive enthusiasts in the region.

data.title: Midea sponsors TotalEnergies CAF AFCON 2025, after deal with CAF, based in Foshan, China, top sponsor for event.
data.description: In Foshan, China on July 17, 2025, Midea and the Confédération Africaine de Football (CAF) finalized a deal for Midea to serve as an Official Sponsor of the TotalEnergies CAF Africa Cup of Nations ("AFCON") 2025. This partnership marks a significant milestone for Midea, a major global company.

data.title: Distribution Solutions Group (NASDAQ: DSGR) to report Q2 results on July 31st, 2025, pre-market. Conference call at 9:00 am ET.
data.description: Distribution Solutions Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: DSGR) based in Fort Worth, Texas, revealed plans to release its second quarter results for fiscal year 2025 on July 31, 2025, before the market opens. The multi-platform distribution company will conduct a conference call with prepared statements starting at 9:00 a.m. ET on the same day. Interested parties can access additional presentation slides on the Company's investor relations Events webpage at https://investor.distribution.

data.title: Coastline Real Estate Group in San Diego, joins The Real Brokerage, a top-ranked team in the area.
data.description: Coastline Real Estate Group, a leading real estate team in San Diego County, has recently become a part of The Real Brokerage. This move signifies a significant development in the real estate market, as Coastline Real Estate Group is renowned for its top performance. The Real Brokerage, known for its innovative approach and strong presence, gains a valuable addition with this merger. The acquisition is expected to bolster The Real Brokerage's position in the industry and enhance its capabilities. This union brings together two prominent players in the real estate sector, consolidating their expertise and resources. This partnership is poised to drive growth and success, creating a powerful force in the market.

data.title: APi Group to release Q2 2025 financial results on July 31, 2025, before market opens; conference call at 8:30am ET.
data.description: In New Brighton, Minnesota, APi Group Corporation (NYSE: APG) disclosed plans to unveil its financial outcomes for the three and six months concluding on June 30, 2025, prior to the market commencement on Thursday, July 31, 2025. The company is set to conduct a Second Quarter Earnings Conference Call at 8:30 a.m. (Eastern Time) on the same day, where they will delve into these results. Key participants during the call will feature Russell A. Becker.

data.title: Webster Financial Corporation reports $251.7 million net income and $1.52 EPS for Q2 2025, up from $175.5 million last year.
data.description: Webster Financial Corporation, the parent company of Webster Bank, N.A., revealed a net income applicable to common stockholders of $251.7 million, equating to $1.52 per diluted share, for the quarter concluding on June 30, 2025. This marks a significant increase from the previous year's quarter, where the net income was $175.5 million, or $1.03 per diluted share, ending on June 30, 2024. John R. Ciulla, chairman and chief executive of Webster, expressed satisfaction with the company's strong financial and strategic performance in the latest quarter.

data.title: Arq Inc. to release Q2 financial results on Aug 11, 2025, and hold earnings call on Aug 12 at 8:30 am ET.
data.description: Arq, Inc., a leading producer of activated carbon and environmentally friendly carbon products, is set to disclose its financial results for the second quarter of 2025. The company, listed as (NASDAQ: ARQ), will unveil its performance and submit its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the period closing on June 30, 2025. These updates are expected to be released post-market closure on Monday, August 11, 2025. Furthermore, a conference call to delve into the financial outcomes is slated for 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on Tuesday, August 12, 2025.

data.title: OptimizeRx to hold Q2 conference call on August 7, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. ET to discuss results ending June 30, 2025.
data.description: WALTHAM, Massachusetts - On July 17, 2025, OptimizeRx Corp. (Nasdaq: OPRX), a prominent healthcare technology solutions provider aiding life sciences firms in connecting with healthcare professionals and patients, announced its upcoming conference call scheduled for Thursday, August 7, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. EST. This call will focus on the company's performance during the second quarter concluding on June 30, 2025. The financial outcomes will be disclosed through a press release before the call takes place.

data.title: Almaden Minerals Ltd. plans to move listing from TSX to TSX Venture Exchange in Canada. Posted on July 17, 2025. Byline: GLOBE NEWSWIRE.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, Almaden Minerals Ltd. revealed its plans to transition its Canadian stock exchange listing from the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: AMM) to the TSX Venture Exchange (TSXV: AAUAF). This move signifies the Company's strategic shift and commitment to the venture exchange platform.
